title: Fix direct.rs: use display_width for selector column widths
description: selector_data() in direct.rs uses .len() to compute max_id_len (provider picker) and max_provider_w (model picker), then uses format\!("{:width$}", ...) which pads by scalar count not display cells. Should use display_width() for these calculations. Currently ASCII-only so not visible, but should be consistent. Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
